reviews.review_description:
GAME: Cube Bouncers

————————————
RATING

Moderation-5/10 : Decent.

Replay ability- 2/10: Doesn’t Really Encourage Users To Log Back On And The Gamemodes Are So Repetitive.

Creativity - 0/10: Basically The Same As Cube Runners, But It Is Slightly Worse Than It. 

Quality- 2/10: Decent quality , Some Free Assets , Some Skidded From Cube Runners Or  From A YouTube Tutorial 

Monetization- 2/10: The Daily Reward Is Like Gorrila Tag’s: Not The Best. With The High Shop Prices It’s Almost Impossible To Get Good Items Without Grinding Forever.
 —————————
SUMMARY
3/10

A Game That Has Potential But Isn’t Really The Best, There Is Some Things Weighing The Game Down. Please Fix Some Stuff.

From: Galaxystar, this game is so good! It’s the best game ever! Everyone should play this! And staff are mostly￼ online! But there’s one thing you should do and 1 thing you should not do… 

Here’s the thing you should do: read all of the rules and all of the rules in the discord. But the thing you should not do isssssssss, DONT ASK FOR MOD. Oh and one more thing, DONT PLAY CUBIC VERSE￼!!! because, the owner ￼of cubic verse is RACIST! Idk if that’s true because the owner said he was but other people say hes not but anyways HE COIPIES ASSETS AND GAMES so thats why you should not install cubic verse but you should install cube bouncers.
I can tell this game was rushed to the point they had to steal assets from cube runners. This game is like cube runners but on a Budget
So if your seeing this if you find a guy with a name called vrcheats LEAVE THE CODE EMEDEATLY sorry for Bad spelling but after a week or so he might be banned also good game snow

Hi! Im badybean. This game is wonderful with great staff and hard working developers to keep the game going! The game is down but the discord isn't and almost nobody is toxic in both game and discord! W GAME
This game is great snow gave me a free cheeseburger and it is delicious!
They Definetly Should Add More Gamemodes, Looking Forward To April 1st. This Game Is The Most Fun With Other Players. The Staff Is Very Nice, And The Purges Are Really Fun. Definetly 5 Stars.
This game has a good shop and game modes￼ and stuff the staff members are really good! And the owner is very cool and funny and the anit mods system is kinda great🥹
I'm friends with goober and he show me game can i have 750 cube for the march event
Idk what to put here but the community is w and staff do their job (Ethan vr) and one thing is that they don’t really have a lot of game modes but it’s fine
I just learned my friend goober is friends with the creator which the devs know who he is he's a pretty nice guy and also good game

I know what its like to make a game for the first time and this clearly has a lot of time and effort poured into it. Keep making updates for the game absolutely amazing five stars. 
￼

As a Admin of this game, the community is really good and there is a lot of good updates from my friend Snow (The Owner) and other developers (Like Sh1vai), the moderation including me in general is also really good and funny overall! Would recommend this game to others! - Doritoz
The game is good overall the music is good and the gameplay is good but the manager horrified me and my friend by playing weird music and appearing in different places
I love the fact that second owner and devs are on ALMOST EVERYDAY
First the mods kick you for no reason, 2nd the game isn't very good

There are some bugs, but the game just came out so it’s fine!!

And they got permission from xdee1 to make the game!!

Pretty cool’s maps, like horror and more!!
i wold recomend this game if you like cube runners. And ￼the owner snow is a GOAT he is so nice and funny
the amount of asset rips i’ve found from cr v1 in this game is insane
